operational_knowledge_units.title: Aveva API page provides real-time KPI tracking for item exchanges
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies an Aveva API page used for real-time tracking of KPIs related to item exchanges in an automated sorting system.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'System Metrics / Aveva API page'
Bullet text: 'Real-time tracking of KPIs for item exchanges in an automated sorting system.'

relationships.target: item exchanges in an automated sorting system

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System Metrics slide describing an Aveva API page that supports real-time KPI tracking for item exchanges in an automated sorting system.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Aveva API page exposes exchange-related KPI fields
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Aveva API page includes named KPI and status fields associated with exchange activity, lane identity, and zone context.
observed_evidence: Listed fields: 'Average Item Count Per Exchange'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Aveva API page UI/reference slide listing exchange KPI fields: Average Item Count Per Exchange, Median System Generated Exchange(s), Lane Name, Last System Generated Exchange, Number of Exchanges, Number of HotBins, Number of MissSorts, Number of SurePost, Percent of Exchanges, Status, and Zone.

procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide lists KPI fields available on the Aveva API page but does not show an action sequence, controls, or numbered workflow.
warnings: Slide is a KPI/API page overview and field list, not an explicit operational procedure.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded procedure candidate for slide 47 because the slide provides an Aveva API page overview and KPI field list without explicit reusable action steps.
